flashcards.definition: Tiny air sacs (~300 million) in the lungs where O₂/CO₂ exchange occurs with capillaries.
Windpipe; supported by C-shaped cartilage rings; leads to the bronchi.
Voice box; contains vocal cords; epiglottis guards the airway during swallowing.
Two main branches of the trachea (right and left); carry air into each lung.
Double-layered serous membrane (visceral + parietal) surrounding each lung.
